plugins.name: chet
plugins.description: Chet — managed Claude-expertise agent. Reads current Claude/Anthropic facts (model lineup, model choice, connectors, pricing) live via the gated Chet connector, routing by topic; answers craft questions from bundled references; degrades only to a bundled dated floor. Installs into your own Cowork; access is entitlement-gated. v1.1.0.
